summary: Pattern V2 integration testing completed. Backend APIs /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/{symbol} working correctly for BTC (Triple Top) and ETH (Symmetrical Triangle). Frontend integration verified: usePatternV2 hook fetches data, PatternStateCard renders decision-grade info below chart, PatternSVGOverlay renders pattern geometry and trigger lines on chart, legacy PatternOverlay hidden when V2 triggers present.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/BTC?timeframe=4H returns valid data with dominant pattern (Triple Top), render_contract, triggers, alternatives
Backend API /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/ETH?timeframe=4H returns valid data with dominant pattern (Symmetrical Triangle), render_contract, triggers
usePatternV2 hook fetches pattern data and normalizes it correctly
PatternStateCard renders below chart with pattern type (Triple Top)
PatternStateCard shows Wait Conditions section with breakout/breakdown trigger levels
PatternSVGOverlay renders pattern geometry via polyline for triple_top
PatternSVGOverlay renders trigger lines (red breakdown, orange invalidation)
Legacy PatternOverlay card hidden when V2 triggers present (v2_triggers check in ResearchChart.jsx line 1636)
Chart renders candlestick data with structure swings (HH/HL markers)
MTF data loads correctly with tf_map containing all timeframes
seed_data_creation: None required - using live Coinbase data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pattern V2 system fully integrated. usePatternV2 hook in /app/frontend/src/modules/ta/patterns/usePatternV2.js fetches from /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/{symbol}. PatternStateCard renders decision-grade info. PatternSVGOverlay renders geometry (two_lines for triangles, polyline for triple top) and trigger lines. BTC shows Triple Top CONFLICTED, ETH shows Symmetrical Triangle CONFLICTED. WebSocket connections have intermittent issues but don't affect core functionality.
